title: Lost Lore [Cobblemon]
description: This addon aims to add the extended canon that is the anime/movies, side games & manga to Cobblemon!
body:
# Lost Lore - Expanding the Cobblemon Canon
In over 30 years of Pokémon as a franchise, they released many forms of media outside of the mainline games which includes many cool and unique forms and variants of beloved Pokémon - so why stop with forms from the mainline games? This addon aims to add many of them from various sources like the anime, movies, manga or side/spin-off games that are not considered _canon_.

## Important when trying this on servers (for v2.0 - v2.1.1)!
Mega Showdown had some issues with getting the custom types to work on servers which causes some graphical issues on Fabric and prevent you from joining on NeoForge    
**It is however possible** to join servers with this mod installed ***if*** each player opens a singleplayer world before trying to connect to the server    

### This issue is fixed for v2.2.0+

# Suggested Addons:
This pack contains a few Pokémon that are not animated or obtainable at all in base Cobblemon - To make your life easier I added a list of some fully compatible addons for you to also check out!
<details>
<summary>Click me!</summary>

### [AllTheMons x Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy):
Adds 99% of the missing mons and some legendary _(like Zarude, Lugia, Mewtwo or Rayquaza)_, as well as MSD item recipes _(like Red/Adamant Orb)_ required for this addon. Also required for the Armored/Shadow Mewtwo models _(for v2.0 - v2.3)_
### [Eeveelutions Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eeveelutions-reimagined) _or_ [CobbleMotion](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemotion):
Both add animations to Sandy (Lana's Eevee) & their Eeveelutions. While Eeveelutions Reimagined only adds animations to the Eevee line - CobbleMotion includes animations for many other mons aswell! Use _either_ CobbleMotion or Eeveelutions Reimagined, using both could lead to issues!
### [OJ's Animations](https://modrinth.com/user/Ojcastillo29):
Adds animations to Zarude _(sadly this addon has since been removed from modrinth)_
</details>

# Which cosmetic Items are included?:
Lost Lore adds a few items that change the Form of a Pokémon while held. Please note that these Items are fully cosmetic and don't change the stats of the altered forms - They are just for your personal enjoyment!

<details>
<summary>Pledge Fragment</summary>

Gives Keldeo its resolute form appearance when held in its cosmetic slot    
![Pledge Fragment Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/920fa125de9039c5eaca94022d6b85dcd422fe1f.jpeg)  
</details>

<details>
<summary>Water Shuriken</summary>

Gives Greninja its Ash Greninja appearance when held in its cosmetic slot    
![Water Shuriken Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12300ce2a2e835f79de525e219c096c0124debb2_0.webp)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Magical Music Sheet</summary>

Gives Meloetta its Pirouette form appearance when held in its cosmetic slot     
</details>

<details>
<summary>Radiating Zygarde Core (not implemented yet)</summary>

Gives any Zygarde its 100% form appearance when held in its cosmetic slot   
_This item is currently not implemented and just an idea of what's coming_
</details>

# The Custom Types in Lost Lore:
Among new cosmetics and Pokémon - Lost Lore also adds two new types to Cobblemon, specifically the Shadow type known from spin-offs such as Pokémon XD, Colloseum or Pokken Tournament as well a the Crystal type exclusive to the Crystal Onix line!

<details>
<summary>Shadow type details!</summary>

## How does the Shadow Type work?
### General info:
- The Shadow-type has its own Tera, Z-Crystal, moves, type-effectiveness and much more
- Currently the only two Shadow Pokémon are Mewtwo & Lugia
### Shadow Energy:
- To turn Pokémon into their Shadow variants you need a **Shadow Energy**
- Using it requires 250+ friendship with Lugia/Mewtwo and resets its friendship to 0    
![Shadow Energy Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0236cf554a09fea976357daacc933a8cb4e0e496.jpeg)    
### Type Chart & effectiveness:
- Shadow moves are 2x effective against every type _(2x against dual types as well)_
- Shadow moves are 0.5x effective against shadow itself
- Shadow Pokémon take neutral damage from all types _(except Shadow)_ and have no immunities
### Shadow Pokémon:
- Shadow Pokémon lose their original type and turn into pure Shadow-type 
- Shadow Pokémon keep their original type STAB _(as well as getting Shadow STAB)_
## Shadow Moves:
### Black Vortex
- Shadow type's signature Z-Move _(requires Shadowium-Z)_
- Damage calculates based on the move used as a base
### Max Void
- Shadow type's signature Dynamax Move
- Damage calculates based on the move used as a base
- Boosts speed of the user & allies
### Shadow Blast:
- Shadow version of Aeroblast
- 80 bp, 100% accuracy, 5 pp, physical
- Has an increased critical hit ratio
### Shadow Down:
- Shadow version of Screech
- 100% accuracy, 10 pp, status
- Lowers the Defense of all opponents by two stages each
### Shadow Shed:
- 100% accuracy, 5 pp, status
- Removes effects of Safeguard, Reflect, & Light Screen from the opponent's field
### Shadow Storm:
- 95 bp, 100% accuracy, 5 pp, physical
- Hits all opponents

</details>

<details>
<summary>Crystal type details!</summary>

## How does the Crystal Type work?
### General info:
- The Crystal-type has its own Tera, Z-Crystal, moves, type-effectiveness and much more
- Currently the only Crystal Pokémon are part of the Crystal Onix line
### Type Chart & effectiveness:
- Crystal moves are 2x effective against Water, Ghost, Dark, Rock & Steel
- Crystal moves are 0.5x effective against Psychic & Ice
- Crystal Pokémon take 2x damage from Fire, Fighting, Rock & Steel
- Crystal Pokémon take 0.5x damage from Ice, Ground, Psychic & Fairy
- Immune to Sandstorm damage
## Crystal Moves:
### Glinting Beam
- Crystal type's signature Z-Move _(requires Crystalium-Z)_
- Damage calculates based on the move used as a base
### Crystal Barrier:
- 100% accuracy, 15 pp, status
- Boosts users defense by 2 and lowers speed by 1
### Crystal Cannon:
- 80 bp, 100% accuracy, 10 pp, special
- Has a 15% chance to burn the target
### Crystal Veil:
- 100% accuracy, 15 pp, status
- Lowers targets accuracy by 1
### Crystalline Overload:
- 130 bp, 95% accuracy, 5 pp, special
- Lowers the users special attack by 2
### Max Prism
- Crystal type's signature Dynamax Move
- Boosts defense & special defense of the user & allies
- Damage calculates based on the move used as a base
### Shard Strike:
- 40 bp, 100% accuracy, 30 pp, physical
### Shiny Glare:
- 100% accuracy, 5 pp, status
- Traps the target on the field
### Unstable Surge:
- 130 bp, 90% accuracy, 10 pp, special
- Deals a lot of crash damage to the user if it misses

</details>

# Which Pokémon are included?:
Pictures of all of these can be found in the gallery tab! Please note that the recipes, as well as the sprites and stats are subject to chang, so be sure to regularly check if you wanna be up-to-date!    

<details>
<summary>Black Fog (The Electric Tale of Pikachu)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
**Stats:** HP: 139, ATK: 45, DEF: 103, SP ATK: 155, SP DEF: 77, SPD: 51    
**Ability:** Ancient Horrors _(once per battle it survives using explosion/self destruct with 10% HP)_     
**Moves:** Loosely based on Gengar, with three Signature moves _(check the section below for more info on those)_     
## Signature Moves:
### Gastly Assault:
A 20 bp, 95% accuracy Ghost-type special move that:    
- Hits target 5x    
- Deals physical damage     
- Has smart targeting like Dragon Darts     
### Soul Leech:
A 90% accuracy Dark-type status move that:    
- Traps the target    
- deals 1/8% max HP damage per turn   
- heals Black Fog for amount of damage dealt       
### Commandment:
A 100% accuracy Dark-type status move that either:    
- Heals for 50% max HP    
- Boost Def/SpD by one stage    
- Boost SpA by two stages & raises critical hit ratio     
## How do I get it?
*Rare spawn in Ancient Cities*    
*Spawns more commonly at night time*    
*Spawns in hords with up to 7 Gastly & 3+ perfect IVs*    
</details>

<details>
<summary>Shadow Lugia/Mewtwo (Pokken Tournament/Gale of Darkness)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
### Shadow Lugia
**Stats:** Same as regular Lugia    
**Ability:** Shadow Pressure and Shadow Guard _(same abilities as regular Lugia, just different names)_     
**Moves:** Regular Lugia move pool + Shadow Blast, Shadow Shed, Shadow Down & Shadow Storm _(check the Shadow-type section for more info on those)_    
### Shadow Mewtwo
**Stats:** +20% Atk/SpA & -20% Def/Spd    
**Ability:** Shadow Boost _(boosts super effective moves by 1.25x)_     
**Moves:** Regular Mewtwo move pool + Shadow Blast, Shadow Shed, Shadow Down & Shadow Storm _(check the Shadow-type section for more info on those)_    

## How do I get them?
*Requires [ATM x MSD](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy) to obtain Lugia/Mewtwo as well as to have/see the Shadow Mewtwo model _(for Lost Lore v2.0 & v2.1 only)_*    
*Use the Shadow Energy on Lugia/Mewtwo to turn them into their Shadow Forms*    
*Requires at least 250 friendship to use it & resets it back to 0*    
*Can be reversed by using it again*    
</details>

<details>
<summary>Armored Mewtwo (Mewtwo Strikes Back Movie)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
**Stats:** HP: 106, ATK: 130, DEF: 110, SP ATK: 90, SP DEF: 154, SPD: 90    
**Ability:** Battle Armor _(prevents the opponent from landing a critical hit)_    
**Moves:** Regular Mewtwo move pool + Metal Claw, Iron Defense, Iron Head, Bullet Punch, Screech, Smart Strike, Flash Cannon, Iron Tail, Meteor Mash, Sunsteel Strike    
**Notes:** Mega Evolves into regular Mega X/Y - tho I plan on giving it a custom mega!    
## How do I get it?
![Recipe Binding Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75279a9254391e0721a8b35f2237f0bf26332858.jpeg)    
*Requires [ATM x MSD](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy) to obtain Mewtwo as well as to have/see the model _(for Lost Lore v2.0 - 2.3)_*    
*Use the Binding Armor on Mewtwo to turn it into Armored Mewtwo*    
*Can be reversed by using it again*    
</details>

<details>
<summary>Riolu & Lucario Costumes & Scarfs (Pokémon Unite/Mystery Dungeon)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
Fully Cosmetic Forms so nothing of interest here!    
Costumes include the Mystery Dungeon Scarfs, as well as the Costume Party, Martial Arts, Concert, Space, Captain, Cafe, Chef, Ruins and Holiday Costumes from Unite
## How do I get them?
![Recipe Green Scarf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3348953a83179d7b85f63871c2b7a404b587f661_0.webp)    
![Recipe Red Scarf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7f1d9d3ee536c48b8df6769bb2034fbdd3be681_0.webp)    
![Costume Box Lucario Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a94bb16b8887cfe9c22e48f978e2df13472e7b4.jpeg)    
*Give Riolu/Lucario a green/red scarf to hold _(cosmetic slot)_ to turn them into the PMD/PSMD forms*    
*Use the Costume Box on Lucario to switch between its many outfits from Unite*    
*Can be reversed by unequiping the scarfs or circling through all costumes*     
</details>

<details>
<summary>Incineroar Costumes (Many - maaaany references)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
Fully Cosmetic Forms so nothing of interest here!    
Costumes include the Astronaut, Champion, Band, Bionicle, Cafe, Dancer Shorts, Detective, El Brave, Pride Shirt (+ Ace, Bi, Pan & Trans Pride variants), Rivals of Aether, Royal Mask, Santa, Summer, Team Magma (+ OR/AS variant), Team Rocket (+ Anime variant), Team Skull & Tekken costumes    
## How do I get them?
![Costume Box Incineroar Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf133e39d3a91aa205188e5a778dc86b8ff136af.jpeg)    
*Use the Costume Box on Incineroar to switch between its many outfits*    
*Can be reversed by circling through all costumes once*     
</details>

<details>
<summary>Spiky-Eared Pichu (Pokémon Heart Gold/Soul Silver)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
Fully Cosmetic Form so nothing of interest here!
## How do I get it?
![Recipe Ancient Light Ball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ccc1b296a7b289945e50e0611202d3f8c199342.jpeg)    
*Give Pichu an ancient light ball to hold _(cosmetic slot)_ to turn it Spiky-Eared*    
*Can be reversed by unequiping it*     
</details>

<details>
<summary>Meta Groudon (Wish Maker Movie)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
**Stats:** HP: 113, ATK: 97, DEF: 130, SP ATK: 147, SP DEF: 113, SPD: 70        
**Typing:** Ground & Poison    
**Abilities:** Thermal Exchange & Earth Eater   
**Moves:** Losely based on Groudons move pool, features many fitting grass, ground & poison moves    
## How do I get it?
![Recipe Corrupted Wish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c33d0b3bfecb4ad80bb87f73026587eee0ed7693_0.webp)    
*Requires [ATM x MSD](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy) to obtain Groudon and the recipe for the needed red orb*    
*Use the Corrupted wish on Groudon to turn it into Meta/Virus Groudon*    
*Can be reversed by using it again*    
</details>


<details>
<summary>Primal Dialga (Pokémon Mystery Dungeon)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
**Stats:** HP: 100, ATK: 140, DEF: 140, SP ATK: 180, SP DEF: 110, SPE: 110    
**Ability:** Full Metal Body (Stats can’t be lowered by opponent)    
## How do I get it?
![Time Gear Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29a9d5cc2dfd0107ec6fe30be50836ba01b8be71.jpeg)    
*Requires [ATM x MSD](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy) to obtain Dialga and the recipe for the needed adamant orb*    
*Give Dialga a Time Gear to hold to turn it into Primal Dialga*    
*Can be reversed by unequiping*    
</details>


<details>
<summary>Dada Zarude (Secrets of the Jungle Movie)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
Fully Cosmetic Form so nothing of interest here!
## How do I get it?
![Ripped Cape recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cc6725c763b1c5c2c77730e69eab9aaa01a39a3.png)    
*Requires [ATM x MSD](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy) to obtain Zarude naturally*    
*Give Zarude a ripped cape to hold _(cosmetic slot)_ to turn it into Dada*    
*Can be reversed by unequiping it*    
</details>


<details>
<summary>Kecleon Shopkeeper/Reddy (Mystery Dungeon Series/Anime ep. 205)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
### Shopkeeper
Basically a regular Kecleon with unique colors    
The Shopkeeper is always male _(it's the Kecleon **Brothers** afterall)_    
### Reddy
Significantly harder to catch than regular Kecleons    
Reddy is always male    
## How do I get them?
*Both spawn in the same locations as regular Kecleons*    
*The Shopkeeper always spawns with its brother - a regular Kecleon*    
*Reddy is a rare spawn*    
</details>


<details>
<summary>MT/MT2 (Pokestars Studios from BW2)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
### MT:
**Stats:** 600 BST _(100 in each stat)_    
**Typing:** Mono Steel type    
**Ability:** Analytic    
### MT2:
**Stats:** 600 BST _(100 in each stat)_    
**Typing:** Steel & Electric type    
**Ability:** Flash Fire    
## How do I get them?
*Ultra Rare spawns anywhere in the overworld _(not near villages)_*    
*MT spawns at level 63 with its event moves and 3+ perfect IVs*    
*MT2 spawns at level 72 with its event moves and 5+ perfect IVs*    
</details>


<details>
<summary>Snowman Munchlax/Snorlax (Pikachu Short no. 9)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
### Snowman Munchlax
**Typing:** Mono Ice Type    
**Stats:** Swapped Attack & Special Attack stats    
**Abilities:** Ice Body, Thick Fat, Hustle (hidden)    
**Moves:** Based on regular Munchlax + lots of ice moves    
**Evolution:** Evolves normally into Snowman Snorlax    
### Snowman Snorlax
**Typing:** Mono Ice Type    
**Stats:** Swapped Attack & Special Attack    
**Abilities:** Ice Body, Thick Fat, Frosty Winds (hidden - Boosts DMG & Accuracy of [Wind-Moves](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Wind_move))    
**Moves:** Based on regular Snorlax + lots of ice moves    
**Notes:** Can use its Z-Move, Gmax and Gmax-Replenish normally    
## How do I get them?
*Rare spawn in snowy biomes*
</details>

 
<details>
<summary>Mismagius/Rayquaza Illusion (Pokémon Anime ep. 509)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
### Illusionary Rayquaza
**Typing:** Ghost/Flying type    
**Stats:** Same as Rayquaza, SpD & Spe raised to 105 to match Mismagius'    
**Moves:** A combination of both Mismagius' & Rayquazas move pools    
### Illusionary Mega Rayquaza
**Typing:** Dragon/Flying type _(due to coding limitations on my end)_    
**Stats:** Same as Mega Rayquaza    
## How do I get it?
![Dream Catcher recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36d6a6f8f4f36fbeaea277c2a618e9e9adac91aa.png)    
*Requires [ATM x MSD](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy) to obtain Rayquaza naturally*    
*Use Dream Catcher on a Mismagius and afterwards on a Rayquaza*    
*Can be reversed by using the item again*    
</details>


<details>
<summary>Sandy/Lana's Eevee (Pokémon Anime ep. 1038)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
All Eeveelutions of Sandy have their own unique Hairstyles    
**Evolution:** Evolves normally into all eevee evolutions    
**Notes:** Can use its Z-Move, Gmax and Gmax-Cuddle normally    
## How do I get them?
*Rare spawn in Woodland Mansions*    
*Give Eevee or any Eeveelution shears to hold _(cosmetic slot)_ to turn it into Sandy*    
*Can be reversed by unequiping it*    
</details>

 
<details>
<summary>Mimikins/Acerola's Mimikyu (Pokémon Anime ep. 1012)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
Mimikins is always female and its shiny is inverted    
**Notes:** Can use its Z-Crystal & Ability normally    
## How do I get it?
*Ultra-Rare spawn in the Deep Dark*    
</details>


<details>
<summary>Black Tyranitar (Golden Boys Manga Chapter 22/23)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
**Stats:** HP: 105, ATK: 164, DEF: 130, SP ATK: 50, SP DEF: 130, SPD: 101    
**Moves:** Expanded its move pool to closer reflect his appearance in the manga    
**Notes:** Cannot Mega evolve, breed, or be evolved into    
![Black Tyranitar info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f1ef785faefa915164a16500cb7eacc34080c2a.png)
## Custom Z Move/Crystal:
Dark Tyranitarium-Z transforms the move Rock Wrecker into **Kaiju Cataclysm**    
Hits all Pokémon on the field, removes terrain, raises both its defenses & makes all targets flinch    
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dff8fb3d509901d0c467553f2a8e7f58ba4136b3.png)
## How do I get it?
*Ultra rare spawn at level 100 in naturally generated villages (Vanilla & BCA)*    
</details>


<details>
<summary>Crystal Onix/Steelix (Pokémon Anime ep. 87)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
### Crystal Onix
**Typing:** Crystal Type    
**Moves:** Has a custom move pool with a few crystal moves added _(read more about them in the "Custom Types" section)_    
**Stats:** HP: 60, ATK: 45, DEF: 130, SP ATK: 70, SP DEF: 80, SPE: 50    
**Abilities:** Brittle Crystal _(when hit gain +2 speed, -1 defense, attacker takes 1/8 of their HP as damage)_ & Crystalline _(changes all rock moves to Crystal type & boosts their damage by 20%)_    
**Evolution:** Feed it 600 Crystals _(amethyst shards count as 1, small buds 2, medium 4, large 6 & clusters as 8)_ then you can evolve it at level 40+ at dawn *(sunrise)*     
### Crystal Steelix
**Typing:** Crystal Type    
**Moves:** Has a custom move pool with a few crystal moves added _(read more about them in the "Custom Types" section)_    
**Stats:** HP: 90, ATK: 45, DEF: 180, SP ATK: 120, SP DEF: 90, SPE: 35    
**Abilities:** Brittle Crystal _(when hit gain +2 speed, -1 defense, attacker takes 1/8 of their HP as damage)_ & Crystalline _(changes all rock moves to Crystal type & boosts their damage by 20%)_    
**Mega Evolution:** Requires Crystalline Steelixite    
### Crystal Mega Steelix
**Typing:** Crystal Type    
**Stats:** HP: 90, ATK: 40, DEF: 212, SP ATK: 166, SP DEF: 122, SPE: 30    
**Ability:** Hall of Mirrors _(15% chance that the attacker will miss and become confused instead)_    
## How do I get it?
*Crystal Onix is a rare spawn in caves/underground, Crystal Steelix has to be evolved into & Mega Crystal Steelix requires you to use the Crystalline Steelixite Mega Stone*    
</details>

 
<details>
<summary>CharmanderTwo/BulbasaurTwo/SquirtleTwo (Mewtwo Strikes Back Movie)</summary>

## Stats, Abilities and any other info:
**Levelling:** They require less EXP to level up _(fast experience group)_    
**Notes:** They can mega evolve normally    
## How do I get them?
*Put a `Nether Star` and a `Charcoal Stick`/`Miracle Seed`/`Mystic Water` into a [Resurrection Machine](https://wiki.cobblemon.com/index.php/Resurrection_Machine)*    
*They come with 4+ random perfect IVs*    
</details>

## Where to get help, leave a suggestion or report a bug?:
You have two options, depending on which discord server you wanna join. I mean you can join both but please don't ask the same question in both channels. Like fr - I won't answer faster if y'all spam me with messages kekw
### The Cobblemon Discord
1. Join the [Cobblemon Discord](https://discord.com/invite/cobblemon) 
2. Go to [this](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1340530002185158767) channel
### The Mega Showdown Discord
1. Join the [Mega Showdown Discord](https://discord.com/invite/egeWG4GXhN) 
2. Go to [this](https://discord.com/channels/1334216416617824386/1384822450176659476) channel
